devdoc.details: DO NOT deploy to a real network. There's no access control on slash.         Production replacement: the canonical AllocationManager address         for the target network (mainnet / Hoodi / etc.) per         https://github.com/Layr-Labs/eigenlayer-contracts/blob/dev/script/output

_totalSlashedPerOperator.details: operator => cumulative wadSlashed across all slash() calls,      summed over all per-strategy entries (matching the adapter's      "single wad per strategy" assumption).

devdoc.title: MockAllocationManager

SlashRecorded(address,uint32,uint256[],s.notice: Emitted on every slash call. Mirrors what real EigenLayer         emits (flattened) so test harnesses can listen.

lastDescription().notice: Most-recent description string — useful for tests asserting         the adapter encoded reasonHash correctly.

lastOperatorSetId().notice: Most-recent operatorSetId — useful for tests asserting the         adapter pinned the right set.

lastStrategyCount().notice: Number of strategies most-recently passed to slash() — useful         for tests asserting the adapter packed the array correctly.

userdoc.notice: Test double for EigenLayer v2 AllocationManager — implements the         exact `slash(SlashingParams)` ABI so EigenLayerSlasherAdapter can         exercise the real call path in tests.
